Title: User navigates to settings page

Expected Result: The settings page opens

Title: User navigates to Pathfinder page
Preconditions: User is on the homepage

Expected Result: The Pathfinder page opens

Preconditions: User is on the Pathfinder page

Title: User proceeds to question display from Pathfinder page
Preconditions: User is on the Pathfinder page
Test Steps:
1. User clicks "Indietro"
2. User does not click "Indietro" again
Expected Result: A question is displayed

Title: User receives a message indicating no suggestion is available
Preconditions: User has answered a question
Expected Result: A message indicating no suggestion is available is displayed
